About Us

EasyCalc was built with one simple goal: make everyday calculations accessible to everyone — no sign-up, no cost, no complexity.

What is EasyCalc?

We are a collection of free online tools that let you calculate percentages, discounts, loan payments, compound interest, date differences, timezone conversions, and more — directly in your browser, no installation needed.

Our mission

We believe everyone deserves access to clear, reliable financial and mathematical tools. Whether you're a student, a professional, an entrepreneur, or simply someone who wants to better understand their finances — EasyCalc is here to help.

How it works

All our calculators run directly on your device. We don't send your data to any external server. Results are instant.

Contact

Have a suggestion or found an error? Visit our contact page.

CalculaFácil

Herramientas online gratuitas para cálculos rápidos.
